predicates.name: is_surviving_legal_cohabitant_of
predicates.description: The first person is the surviving legal cohabitant of the second person, who is the predeceased legal cohabitant.

predicates.name: is_descendant_of
predicates.description: The first person is a descendant of the second person.

predicates.name: preceding_provisions_not_applicable
predicates.description: The preceding provisions do not apply in relation to the surviving legal cohabitant and the predeceased legal cohabitant.
